intent: Compact 2-bedroom single-storey house on an 8x10 m lot with a firewall on the right (right setback = 0). Left side has a 3 m wide carport zone for the first 5.5 m of depth that narrows to 2 m for the rear. Mirrors a typical Filipino row-house unit: ~32.5 sqm of L-shaped interior plus a 16+ sqm covered carport accessed only from outside (no interior door to the carport).
must_haves: front-left carport cut into the building footprint (1 m x 3.5 m)
no interior door from any room to the carport
two bedrooms, one common T&B, kitchen + great room (open plan)
